changes: Additive: pre-computed release cross-references on security releases and BSI entries
Added `PatchesRelease` on BSI entries — resolves the release the BSI sits on top of via PrerequisiteBuild match
Added `SupersededBy` on security releases and BSI entries — next release covering the same device scope, with DaysLater gap
Added `MergedInto` on device-specific releases — next universal release that absorbed the narrow hotfix
Consumers no longer need to derive the BSI→release / narrow→broader / superseded joins client-side
All three fields are optional and skip-if-none — no layout change for consumers that don't read them
BREAKING: v2 feeds introduce a top-level canonical `Devices` map — GDMF identifier -> {DeviceID, MarketingName}
BREAKING: Every `SupportedDevices` field is now a string[] of GDMF identifiers (was Vec<SupportedDevice> objects). Consumers resolve via the top-level Devices map
`SecurityReleases[].SupportedDevices` is now optional — absent means `inherit from parent Latest.SupportedDevices`. Saves ~66% on macos_data_feed.json size via suppression of redundant duplicates

BREAKING: All v2 feed field names normalized to PascalCase — `update_summary`->`UpdateSummary`, `supported_devices`->`SupportedDevices` inside BSI, `apple_slug`->`AppleSlug`, `macos_ipsw_*`->`MacOSIPSW*`, `cves`->`CVEs`, `entry_added_date`->`EntryAddedDate`, etc.
DMS consumer: `SignedVersions[].Build` backfilled from `bsi_history.ndjson` for historical macOS minor versions where live GDMF no longer carries the build string
v2 `InstallationApps` uses new PascalCase mirror structs (`InstallationAppsV2`, `UMAEntryV2`, `MacIPSWEntryV2`); v1 `InstallationApps` shape preserved exactly
Applied uniformly to macOS, iOS, visionOS, tvOS, watchOS feeds and `dms_consumers.json`. v1 feeds untouched.
Changed SupportedDevices from Vec<String> to Vec<SupportedDevice> with board_id, device_id, marketing_name
Removed BSIDeviceDetail and device_details field from BackgroundSecurityImprovements
BSI supported_devices now uses same SupportedDevice struct as release SupportedDevices
Added SchemaVersion field (CalVer) to all v2 feeds
Added schema_version to dms_consumers.json metadata
Added JSON Schema files (.schema.json) for all v2 feeds and DMS consumer feed
Added schema_changelog.json with version history
Added version_extra, device_scope, device_details to BackgroundSecurityImprovements
Added device_details resolution for all platforms in dms_consumers.json
Added content_hash to dms_consumers.json metadata
Enriched SecurityInfoContext with OS codename, BSI mention, days since previous
